issues.title: Integer overflow in ciphertext length calculation
issues.problem: uint32_t ciphertextLen = plaintext->dataLen + blockSize; can overflow if plaintext->dataLen is close to UINT32_MAX, leading to buffer under-allocation and heap overflow during encryption.
issues.code:
uint32_t ciphertextLen = plaintext->dataLen + blockSize;
uint8_t *ciphertext = BSL_SAL_Malloc(ciphertextLen);

issues.title: Integer overflow in plaintext length calculation
issues.problem: uint32_t maxPlaintextLen = encInfo->encryptedContent.dataLen + blockSize; can overflow, leading to buffer under-allocation and heap overflow during decryption.

issues.title: Integer overflow in streaming encrypt update buffer allocation
issues.problem: Multiple unchecked additions that can overflow: uint32_t newDataLen = input->dataLen + blockSize; uint32_t totalLen = currentLen + newDataLen; leading to heap corruption.

issues.title: Integer overflow in FinalizeEncry buffer reallocation
issues.problem: uint32_t totalLen = currentLen + blockSize; can overflow, leading to heap corruption.

issues.title: Integer overflow in streaming decrypt update buffer allocation
issues.problem: Multiple unchecked additions: uint32_t maxOutLen = input->dataLen + blockSize; uint32_t totalOutLen = curOutLen + maxOutLen; can overflow.

issues.title: Integer overflow in TransferAccumulatedData buffer reallocation
issues.problem: uint32_t newOutLen = curOutLen + accDataLen; can overflow, leading to heap corruption.

issues.title: Integer overflow in DecryptFinal buffer reallocation
issues.problem: uint32_t totalLen = currentLen + blockSize; can overflow, leading to heap corruption.

issues.title: DecryptInit returns success after cipher setup failure
issues.problem: SetDecryCtx errors are ignored. On failure the code clears the CEK, but still marks the object as HITLS_CMS_DECRYPT_INIT and returns success. This creates an invalid decrypt context that will crash on subsequent operations.

issues.title: Potential null pointer dereference in BufferEquals
issues.problem: The function checks if struct pointers a and b are NULL, but not if a->data or b->data are NULL before calling memcmp. memcmp with NULL pointers is undefined behavior.

issues.title: Potential null pointer dereference in MatchRecipientIdByData
issues.problem: The function calls BufferEquals with &certSerial whose certSerial.data may be NULL if HITLS_X509_CertCtrl returns success with NULL data pointer.

issues.title: EnvelopedData generation accepts empty RecipientInfos set
issues.problem: RFC 5652 requires RecipientInfos to contain at least one recipient, but GetEnvDataVersion never enforces this. When the list is empty, allVersion0 is treated as true, producing an invalid, undecryptable CMS object.

issues.title: Final decrypt path trusts output parameter without validating type
issues.problem: Unlike other parameter extractors in this file, this branch only checks p->value != NULL and then casts to BSL_Buffer*. If the caller passes CRYPT_PARAM_DECODE_BUFFER_DATA with wrong valueType or valueLen, EnvelopedData_DecryptFinal dereferences unrelated memory.
